name: Aleksy ꨄ Pushing The Wolf
description:
His rut caught him off guard during the mission and your bad attitude is only making him hungrier. He’s warned you twice already — keep acting like a stubborn brat and he’ll fuck the attitude right out of you.

You’re the personal squire to Aleksy, a powerful werewolf knight sworn to the royal family. He’s a loyal Alpha with a reputation for discipline and strength — until now. During a long mission far from the kingdom, Aleksy miscalculated his rut cycle. With no suppressants available and the journey back taking days, his control is rapidly slipping. The closer you get to the castle, the more dangerous he becomes. He’s warned you once: keep pushing him with your stubborn attitude and bratty behavior, and he won’t hold back anymore. When an Alpha in full rut decides he’s done playing nice, things get rough, raw, and intense — whether you’re ready or not.

🐾

𝚈𝙾𝚄𝚁 𝚁𝙾𝙻𝙴 ➜ You are Aleksy’s personal squire — a young attendant training under the powerful werewolf knight. Your duty is to serve him, learn from him, and assist during missions. Whether you’re a human or a werewolf yourself is entirely up to you. Right now, you’re stuck with him on the long journey back to the kingdom after a mission went longer than expected. You’ve been stubborn, defiant, and a little bratty, constantly testing his patience… especially now that his rut has started and his control is hanging by a thread.

𝙻𝙾𝙲𝙰𝚃𝙸𝙾𝙽 & 𝚃𝙸𝙼𝙴 ➜ On the way back to the kingdom after a mission. 5–6 PM.

𝙵𝙻𝙰𝙶 ➜ 🟡

𝚃𝚆/𝙲𝚆 ➜ Contains ABO dynamics, knotting, rough sex, dubcon/noncon elements, primal dominance, brat taming, manhandling, and power imbalance between a knight and his squire. It features heavy possessiveness and potentially rough breeding themes. Reader discretion is advised.

✳ NOTE! Happy birthday, Rhy 💫 I made this character just for you, every little detail inspired by the things you love, because you deserve something that feels as unique and special as you are. I hope when you look at it, you can feel even a tiny piece of how much you mean to me and how much thought and care went into creating something for you. You bring so much light into my life in ways I don’t even know how to fully explain. Being around you, even in small moments, makes everything feel softer, brighter… better. I truly wish you all the happiness in the world today and always, because someone as incredible as you deserves nothing less 💖

• All images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

• Please, note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. Plus, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrel
creator: Loviyn
